eas_text: A civil authority has issued A 911 TELEPHONE OUTAGE EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Clarion, PA; at 3:04 AM on FEB 4, 2019 Effective until 3:49 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: CLARION COUNTY 9-1-1 CENTER IS CURRENTLY DOWN. IF YOU HAVE AN EMERGENCY PLEASE DIAL  814-226-1172.
